case_title: RESTAURANT REALTY COMPANY VS. HIN TSANG et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RESTAURANT REALTY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TSANG, HIN LEUNG, EVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED SEP-22-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, EVA

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JPT JEAN MILEFF FILED BY LEUNG, EVA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESTAURANT REALTY COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EVA LEUNG ONLY. DEFENDANT HIN TSANG IS NOT PRESENT. JPT JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506). PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESTAURANT REALTY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSANG, HIN LEUNG, EVA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,675.00, DEFENDANT HIN TSANG NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF RESTAURANT REALTY COMPANY ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
